hero.description: Your privacy is our priority. Learn how we protect your data and respect your rights.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: At PixBatch, we take a privacy-first approach. We collect minimal information necessary to provide our services:

items.label: Account Information
items.text: Email address, username, and password (encrypted) when you create an account.

items.label: Usage Data
items.text: Information about how you use our service, including features accessed and processing statistics.

items.label: Device Information
items.text: Browser type, operating system, and IP address for security and optimization purposes.

items.label: Cookies
items.text: Essential cookies for authentication and preferences. No third-party tracking cookies.

imagesPrivate.title: Your Images Are Private
imagesPrivate.promise: This is our core promise: All image processing happens directly in your browser using client-side technology.
items: Your images never leave your device
We never upload your images to our servers
We never store your images in any cloud storage
We never analyze the content of your images
We cannot access your images even if we wanted to
imagesPrivate.outro: Everything is processed locally in your browser using modern web APIs. This ensures complete privacy and security for your sensitive images.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUseInformation.intro: We use the limited information we collect only for the following purposes:
items: To provide and maintain our services
To authenticate your account and keep it secure
To improve our platform based on usage patterns
To communicate important updates about our service
To respond to your support requests
howWeUseInformation.outro: We never sell your personal information to third parties. We never share your data with advertisers or data brokers.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information:
items: All data transmission is encrypted using HTTPS/TLS
Passwords are hashed using bcrypt with strong salting
Our infrastructure follows security best practices

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.intro: You have full control over your personal information:

items.label: Access
items.text: Request a copy of your personal data

items.label: Deletion
items.text: Request deletion of your account and data

items.label: Portability
items.text: Export your data in a standard format

items.label: Objection
items.text: Object to certain data processing activities

yourRights.outroPrefix: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at

thirdPartyServices.title: Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.intro: We use minimal third-party services to operate our platform:

items.label: Hosting
items.text: Our infrastructure is hosted on secure cloud providers

items.label: Analytics
items.text: Privacy-focused analytics to understand usage (no personal identification)

items.label: Payment Processing
items.text: Secure payment processors for premium features (PCI-DSS compliant)

thirdPartyServices.outro: These services are carefully selected for their privacy practices and only receive the minimum data necessary.

childrenPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.body: Our service is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately and we will delete such information.

changesToPolicy.title: Changes to This Policy
changesToPolicy.intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will notify you of any material changes by:
items: Posting the updated policy on this page
Updating the Last updated date at the top
Sending an email notification for significant changes
changesToPolicy.outro: We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
contactUs.address: Panchavti Road, Gorwa, Vadodara - 390016, Gujarat, India
